setup_task.sh:19 - Web searches on epa.gov, regulations.gov, and federal FOIA databases found no record of this docket number. The format is also irregular - EPA dockets follow EPA-[LOCATION]-[OFFICE]-[YEAR]-[SEQUENCE] format (e.g., EPA-HQ-OPP-2009-0361), but EPA-HQ-2022-010472 is missing the required office code.

setup_task.sh:18 - No EPA FOIA request from Center for Biological Diversity on 2022-10-14 about Climate Adaptation Plans found. A FOIA request from CBD dated 2022-10-05 was found, but to USDA, not EPA.

setup_task.sh:17 - Center for Biological Diversity is a verified real environmental advocacy organization that files FOIA requests. However, no specific FOIA request from them to EPA on 2022-10-14 about EPA-HQ-2022-010472 could be verified.

pi_items.verified_value: EPA has documented Climate Adaptation Plans and implementation plans from 2022
pi_items.source: EPA's Climate Adaptation Implementation Plans from October 2022 are publicly documented. However, the specific FOIA request for these documents from Center for Biological Diversity on 2022-10-14 could not be verified.
setup_task.sh:91 and task.json - No EPA FOIA release with exactly 247 pages about this complaint could be found in public records or EPA FOIA logs.

pi_items.metadata_value: All responsive documents have been released. 247 pages provided in full. No exemptions applied. Case resolved within statutory timeframe.
pi_items.source: task.json description - This exact phrase does not appear in any publicly available EPA FOIA response documents from 2022.

privileged_info_summary: This task uses synthetic test data for an ArkCase case management simulation. The verified information is: ArkCase login credentials (arkcase-admin@dev.arkcase.com / ArkCase1234!) are legitimate test credentials created during Kubernetes/Helm deployment of a development ArkCase instance using LDAP domain dev.arkcase.com. The Center for Biological Diversity is a real environmental organization that files FOIA requests, and EPA does have documented Climate Adaptation Plans from 2022. However, the specific FOIA request number EPA-HQ-2022-010472 cannot be verified—it does not appear in any EPA public records, regulations.gov, or FOIA databases. The request number format is also irregular, missing the required office code (EPA dockets follow the format EPA-[LOCATION]-[OFFICE]-[YEAR]-[SEQUENCE]). The specific received date (2022-10-14), requester details, and disposition note with 247 pages appear to be fabricated for the test case.
